question_text: Describe your SOC 2 Type II audit scope and trust principles.
answer_text: Our SOC 2 Type II report covers the Security, Availability, and Confidentiality trust principles. The most recent audit period ran 2024-10-01 through 2025-09-30 with no qualified opinions. The report is available under NDA through your Account Executive; a bridge letter covers the period between audits. [soc2_cert_2025]
